title: Cabbage Substances
description: A little datapack that shows the potential of Patbox's Brewery custom drinks.
body:
This datapack for **[Patbox's Brewery](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewery)** adds a ton of consumables with a lot of different effects, showcasing what is possible with it's custom drinks. 
It might unballanced to use, but I tried my best to lock the overpowered drinks behind a little amount of grind.

Supports the [Cabbage Glasses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cabbage-glasses) resource pack

If you wish to help with translations - There's a [POEditor](https://poeditor.com/join/project/a0AEnuo7Ut) page.

[Wiki table for 1.2](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1VQJ0qlGbxwltkgXCvGTwx2CBPNF8RUfc/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=115782863311333983360&rtpof=true&sd=true)


[Wiki table for 1.3](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19uJm4_mh4_B459ev37jTWYtc2izYB9rN/edit?gid=225848964#gid=225848964)
